title: Communicating with Outfield on Fly Ball
firewallFails: Fly ball priority reversed: outfielders have priority over infielders

title: Deep Hit to Center - Relay Setup
Steal to Second — Force or Tag?
Pitch Clock Pressure in Late Inning
Famous: Ted Williams' Launch Angle Swing
judgeIssues: Advanced terms like 'launch angle', 'exit velocity', 'slugging percentage', and 'modern baseball analytics' are not appropriate for diff=1 (6-9yo)
Historical inaccuracy: Launch angle is a modern concept not directly from Ted Williams' era, though his hitting philosophy aligns loosely

title: Runners on First and Third — Minimize Runs
judgeIssues: Semantic overlap in options 2 and 3 (both involve throwing to first)
Advanced term 'run expectancy' used in diff-1 content, not suitable for 6-9yo

title: Shift Positioning Against Pull Hitter
judgeIssues: Inconsistent mention of advancing runners in explanations despite no runners on base
Advanced terms like 'batting average on balls in play' for diff 1 (6-9yo)

title: Coaching Pitch Recognition in a Key Count
Balk with Fly Out to Center
Sacrifice Bunt with Runners on First and Second
judgeIssues: Factual error in best explanation: states 'third base is uncovered' but in standard bunt defense with runners on 1st and 2nd, third base is typically covered by the third baseman for the force play on the lead runner.
Explanation lengths vary significantly (e.g., best is much longer than others), potentially unbalancing the educational delivery.
